name: Iter15 — Skeleton: no spinner, review completes successfully
description: Verify that no SVG spinner appears when analyzing a PR and that the review result renders fully with a score and verdict after analysis.

planSteps.description: The home page loads with a PR URL input field and an Analyze PR button visible
Type https://github.com/OWASP/NodeGoat/pull/300 into the PR URL input field
There is NO spinning circle/SVG loader visible on the page — the loading indicator (if any) uses gray pulsing placeholder blocks, not a spinner
Wait up to 90 seconds for the analysis to finish
A complete review report is now visible containing: a numeric quality score out of 100, a verdict badge (APPROVE or REQUEST CHANGES), and at least one review category section
No error message is shown — the review loaded successfully
